tasks.subject: Task 1: Set up Vite + Three.js project scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Initialize Vite project with Three.js, Vitest, correct folder structure, and a black canvas on screen.

**Files:**
- Create: package.json, index.html, vite.config.js, src/main.js
- Create: src/core/, src/entities/, src/world/, src/systems/, src/ui/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run dev` opens browser with black full-screen canvas, no console errors
- [ ] `npm run test` runs Vitest with 0 tests
- [ ] All module directories exist

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → black screen. `npm run test` → passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "index.html", "vite.config.js", "src/main.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run dev shows black canvas", "npm run test passes", "all src/ dirs exist"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement Scene, Game Loop, Input & Camera
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three.js scene with lighting, delta-time game loop, keyboard input, and third-person follow camera with chaos mode transition.

**Files:**
- Create: src/core/scene.js, src/core/game.js, src/core/input.js
- Create: src/systems/camera.js
- Modify: src/main.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Scene renders with navy background and ambient+directional lighting
- [ ] STATE enum exported from game.js
- [ ] Input captures WASD + arrow keys
- [ ] Camera smoothly follows a test object, FOV changes in chaos mode

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → dark scene, camera follows test cube.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/core/scene.js", "src/core/game.js", "src/core/input.js", "src/systems/camera.js", "src/main.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["navy background visible", "STATE enum exported", "camera follows object"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Implement Arena & Food System
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Visible bounded arena with grid floor, food pellets that respawn, and orbs from dead snakes.

**Files:**
- Create: src/world/arena.js, src/world/food.js
- Create: src/world/arena.test.js
- Modify: src/main.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Wireframe arena box 200x200x80 visible
- [ ] Grid floor spans arena
- [ ] 100 food pellets on floor
- [ ] arena.isOutOfBounds() and distanceToWall() tested

**Verify:** `npm run test` → 8 arena tests pass. `npm run dev` → arena and food visible.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/world/arena.js", "src/world/food.js", "src/world/arena.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["8 arena tests pass", "arena visible in browser", "100 pellets on floor"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Implement Snake Entity, Player & Collision System
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Base Snake with trail-based movement, Player subclass with input, collision detection for wall/body/food/orbs.

**Files:**
- Create: src/entities/snake.js, src/entities/player.js
- Create: src/systems/collision.js, src/systems/collision.test.js
- Modify: src/main.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Player moves, steers with A/D, grows on food
- [ ] Wall collision kills player
- [ ] Self-collision never triggers
- [ ] sphereOverlap() tested

**Verify:** `npm run test` → collision tests pass. `npm run dev` → snake moves and dies on wall.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/entities/snake.js", "src/entities/player.js", "src/systems/collision.js", "src/systems/collision.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 collision tests pass", "player steers", "wall kills player", "self-collision disabled"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Implement AI Snakes, Behavior Tiers & Spawn System
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AI-controlled snakes with 3 tiers, adaptive difficulty, inter-AI competition, spawn scaling.

**Files:**
- Create: src/entities/ai-snake.js, src/systems/ai.js
- Create: src/systems/spawn.js, src/systems/spawn.test.js
- Modify: src/main.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] AI snakes spawn at edges, navigate, grow, die
- [ ] Basic/Intermediate/Aggressive tiers behave differently
- [ ] Spawn count matches 3/5/8/10 table
- [ ] getTargetCount() and getStartingTier() tested

**Verify:** `npm run test` → 11 spawn tests pass. `npm run dev` → AI snakes visible, competing.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/entities/ai-snake.js", "src/systems/ai.js", "src/systems/spawn.js", "src/systems/spawn.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["11 spawn tests pass", "AI snakes spawn and move", "tiers upgrade with length"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Implement Portal & Chaos Mode
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rotating portal objects trigger 30s chaos mode with vertical movement, camera pull-back, and portal respawn.

**Files:**
- Create: src/world/portal.js
- Modify: src/main.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Two rotating neon portals in arena
- [ ] Touching portal → STATE.CHAOS, vertical movement enabled
- [ ] Camera pulls back and FOV widens
- [ ] 30s timer visible, ends cleanly, portals respawn

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → touch portal, chaos activates, vertical movement works, ends after 30s.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/world/portal.js", "src/main.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["portals visible and rotating", "chaos mode triggers on contact", "vertical movement enabled", "returns to normal after 30s"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Implement HUD & Game Over Screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HTML overlay with live stats, minimap, chaos countdown, and death screen with restart.

**Files:**
- Create: src/ui/hud.js, src/ui/gameover.js
- Modify: src/main.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Top-left: length/score/kills update live
- [ ] Top-right: minimap shows snake positions
- [ ] Chaos countdown center-screen during chaos
- [ ] Death screen with stats and working restart

**Verify:** `npm run test` → 24 total tests pass. `npm run dev` → full game playable end-to-end.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ui/hud.js", "src/ui/gameover.js", "src/main.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HUD updates live", "minimap renders", "death screen appears", "restart works", "24 total tests pass"]}
```
